    • Class search.Gateway

      class Gateway extends UnicastRemoteObject implements Serializable

        • averageResponseTimes
          List<Double> averageResponseTimes
          List of average response times for each barrel
        • barrels
          List<BarrelInterface> barrels
          List of active barrels
        • barrelSizes
          List<Integer> barrelSizes

          List<ClientInterface> clients
          List of active clients

          int nextBarrelId
          Next barrel ID

          int nextClientId
          Next client ID

          Registry registry
          RMI registry

          ConcurrentHashMap<String,Integer> topSearches
          Map of top searches
        • urlsToIndex
          LinkedBlockingQueue<String> urlsToIndex
          Queue of URLs to be indexed
        • webClients
          List<ClientServiceInterface> webClients
          List of active web clients
